---
title: "About"
about:
    template: jolla
    image: SeanMaden.jpg
    links:
    - icon: twitter
      text: twitter
      href: https://twitter.com/MadenSean
    - icon: github
      text: Github
      href: https://github.com/metamaden
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/feed/
    - icon: researchgate
      text: ResearchGate
      href: https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Sean-Maden
    - icon: googlescholar
      text: GoogleScholar
      href: https://scholar.google.com/citations?user=tI9CzMgAAAAJ&hl=en
    - icon: orcid
      text: ORCID
      href: https://orcid.org/0000-0002-2212-4894
    - icon: bluesky
      text: BlueSky
      href: https://bsky.app/profile/metamaden.bsky.social 
---

Sean Maden is a Senior Bioinformatician with expertise in transcriptomics, high-dimensional analysis, and machine learning. He earned his Ph.D. in Computational Biology from the Department of Biomedical Engineering 
at Oregon Health & Science University. 

Sean is interested in open-access research projects for data science. He develops 
R/Bioconductor software packages (e.g. [recountmethylation](https://www.bioconductor.org/packages/release/bioc/html/recountmethylation.html) 
and [lute](https://github.com/metamaden/lute)), 
analysis workflows (e.g.
[recountmethylation_instance](https://github.com/metamaden/recountmethylation_instance) 
and [r-nf_deconvolution](https://github.com/metamaden/r-nf_deconvolution)), 
and 
other resources (e.g. 
[geoarraydigest](https://github.com/metamaden/geoarraydigest), [methyPre](https://github.com/metamaden/methyPre), 
[cgageR](https://github.com/metamaden/cgageR), and 
[cgmappeR](https://github.com/metamaden/cgmappeR)) for research.

## Education

Johns Hopkins Bloomberg School of Public Health | Baltimore, MD
Postdoc in Dept. of Biostatistics | June 2022 - present 

Oregon Health & Science University | Portland, OR
PhD in Biomedical Engineering/Computational Biology | June 2018 - June 2022

Reed College | Portland, OR
B.A in Biology/Population Genetics | Sept 2007 - May 2011

## Experience

Fred Hutch | Data Analyst Assistant | Oct 2015 - June 2018

Fred Hutch | Bioinformatics Intern | April - Oct 2015

University of Washington | Laboratory Assistant | Jan 2013 - Oct 2013
